transformationMoves: Replace interpretive summary with the object or body already carrying the pressure.
Pin dialogue to working materials nearby: vellum, wax, straps, stone-light, reins, tack.
Translate abstract consequence into Sylvanas-filtered route logic, posture, and field-read detail.
Let institutional severance ride through documents, horse-work, and relay infrastructure instead of commentary.
Protect cadence with local substitutions rather than expansion-heavy rewrite.

scenes.title: The Camp
scenes.biggestGap: Low current drift; keep the northward decision pinned to map case, roads, horses, and smoke residue.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Field camp south of Stratholme with the north road latent on the marked page.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Map case strap, crate table, and annotated roads keep the inference tactile.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads which work still matters on horseback and which proof would only feed chambers.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Finger, page, and strap contact keep the map exchange embodied.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: North must remain a physical mark on the page before the riders arrive.

scenes.title: The Sister
scenes.biggestGap: Title, recall, and refusal needed less commentary and more contact with vellum, wax, bracer, and road-spent body.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Working camp with picket line, escort riders, and Stratholme's bruise still visible.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Recall vellum, wax seal, bracer seam, and horse gear carry the wound physically.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads the tactic through what Vereesa had to carry and how the camp listens.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Hands on the recall, the map case edge, and Cyndia's horse-work keep the confrontation embodied.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The refusal leaves the document physically undelivered even as the choice becomes public.

scenes.title: The Parallel Severance
scenes.biggestGap: The stone-call lane needed to stay with amber light, posture, and timing rather than abstract approval or emotional labels.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Birch-edge call site with camp sounds behind and the road home already forming.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Stone-light, cuff seam, coat cloth, and dead crystal keep the moment external.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas gets posture, pulse, and timing only.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Observed light behavior and storage gesture prevent over-translation.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Jaina pockets the dead stone as Vereesa carries the folded recall away.

scenes.title: The Road North
scenes.biggestGap: The close needed to finish in wind, salt, lane order, and failing relays instead of thematic shorthand.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The coast road keeps changing under them toward harbor country.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Horse gear, ruts, relay dish, salt, and colder air hold the tail on the page.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads file order and Jaina's body as operational facts.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Road talk stays tied to rein work, saddle shock, and the wind.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The chapter ends on coast, failing relays, borrowed passage, and forward motion.
